emails.subject: Signoffs
emails.body: Signoffs Mark, Before we say "Auf Wiedersehen", I wanted to catch up on some housekeeping. Could you please confirm that you have now signed off on each of the following items for NA: NA GTC's NA ETA NA PA Brochure contents (including letters) Website Contents (including help and FAQ's) General legal relationship and structure of the website and the contracts. Long and Short descriptions Thanks, Dave
